## 💡 Feature Summary
<!-- Ek line mein batao — kya add karna chahte ho? -->

## 🎯 Problem it Solves
<!-- Yeh feature kyun chahiye? Kya problem solve hogi? -->

## 🛠️ Proposed Solution
<!-- Aapka idea kya hai? Kaise implement hona chahiye? -->

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
<!-- Koi aur solution socha tha? Kyun yeh better hai? -->

## 🌍 Use Case / Real-World Example
<!-- Iska real example do — kaise use hoga yeh feature? -->

## 📊 Priority (in your opinion)
- [ ] 🔴 Critical — Framework ke bina kaam nahi chal raha
- [ ] 🟠 High — Bahut important, jaldi chahiye
- [ ] 🟡 Medium — Nice to have
- [ ] 🟢 Low — Future mein dekh lena

## 📝 Additional Context
<!-- Koi screenshots, links, ya references? -->
